query:
UPDATE product_variants pv
JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id
SET pv.variantCode = CONCAT(
  p.sku,
  '-V',
  LPAD(
    SUBSTRING(pv.variantCode, LOCATE('-V', pv.variantCode) + 2),
    3,
    '0'
  )
)
WHERE p.sku != SUBSTRING(pv.variantCode, 1, LOCATE('-V', pv.variantCode) - 1);
